## 🚀 Features

- **Infoblox favicon**: Browser tab now shows the Infoblox green diamond icon instead of a generic blank page icon. Includes ICO, PNG, and Apple Touch Icon variants.
- **Cleaner console output**: Server logs now only show meaningful API activity (validations, scans, updates, exports). Static asset requests, health polls, and status polling are suppressed.
- **Updated page title**: Browser tab reads "Infoblox Universal DDI Token Calculator".
